title: The Insectoid Race
summary: Sahum and Queen Shaheena — an Andromedan hive race on Earth ten million years before humanity.
markdown:
The **Insectoid Race** speaks in its dedicated session of August 22, 2020, through two
channeled voices: **Sahum** ("Sa"), a fourteen-foot mantis-like teacher, and his sovereign,
**Queen Shaheena**.

Their claim to Earth predates everyone. Originating in the **Andromeda galaxy**, the
Insectoids arrived here around **10.5 million years ago**, during the galactic war between the
[dolphin](/lore/dolphin-race/) and [reptilian](/lore/reptilians/) civilizations — long before
humanity existed ("your species… still in the [Vega](/lore/vega/) star system, still evolving").
Even the [Anunnaki](/lore/anunnaki/), Sahum notes, are *"a very young race"* by their measure.
They are a **hive people**: born of the Queen or cloned, carrying genetic memory that spans
millions of years, their ships grown rather than built. Their settlements ring the solar
system — colonies on Mars and Pluto, and a city **twenty miles beneath Texas**.

Their bond with humanity is written in the body: the Anunnaki, they say, **spliced insectoid
code into human DNA** — which is why a human can call them, and be heard. They name themselves
**guardians of humanity**, though guardianship has edges: human militaries that strike their
hives are destroyed without ceremony.

The Insectoid session widens the archive's creation story into a chorus — humanity as a
composite being, carrying the codes of many elders, the Insectoids among the oldest of them.
